req.title: Hr-Admin views training-course
req.statement: An authenticated hr-admin shall be able to view a training-course through the REST API. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

doc.reasoning: R-WEB-048 covers viewing a training-course via REST API for an hr-admin. The happy path (EP) validates 200/201, entity id, and audit record creation. Negative paths cover unauthenticated (401) and forbidden-role (403) access. A boundary case (BVA) probes a training-course id at the minimum valid boundary (id=1) to confirm edge-record retrieval. A decision-table case (DT) confirms 400 on a missing mandatory field in the query. State-transition (STC) confirms the audit record is written only after a successful view, not before.

tests.name: test_hr_admin_can_view_training_course_returns_200_with_entity_id
preconditions: A training-course with a known id exists
actions: Obtain a valid hr-admin auth token via <get_auth_token> fixture
expected: Response body contains the entity id matching the requested course_id
An audit record exists for this view action
trace: R-WEB-048: response 200 or 201 with entity id

tests.name: test_unauthenticated_request_to_view_training_course_returns_401
preconditions: No valid auth token is present
A training-course with a known id exists
expected: Response body contains an error indicator

tests.name: test_forbidden_role_cannot_view_training_course_returns_403
preconditions: User is authenticated but has role 'employee' (not hr-admin)
A training-course with a known id exists
actions: Obtain an auth token for a user with role 'employee' via <get_auth_token>
GET /api/training-courses/{course_id} with the employee Authorization header
expected: Response body contains a permission/forbidden error
No audit record is written for a view action by this user

tests.name: test_view_training_course_at_minimum_boundary_id_returns_200
preconditions: A training-course with the minimum valid id (id=1) exists in the system
actions: Obtain a valid hr-admin auth token via <get_auth_token> fixture
expected: An audit record is written for this view
trace: R-WEB-048: response 200 or 201 with entity id

tests.name: test_view_training_course_missing_mandatory_field_returns_400
preconditions: Endpoint requires a mandatory query parameter 'fields' or similar
actions: Obtain a valid hr-admin auth token via <get_auth_token> fixture
GET /api/training-courses without required mandatory query parameter (e.g. omit 'courseId' if mandatory)
expected: Response body contains a validation error message
trace: R-WEB-048: mandatory fields must be validated

tests.name: test_audit_record_written_only_after_successful_view_state_transition
preconditions: A training-course with a known id exists
No prior audit record exists for this course_id view by this user in this session
actions: Confirm no audit record exists before the request
Confirm audit record exists after the request
expected: Before request: audit record count for this resource is N
After request: audit record count for this resource is N+1
trace: STC: state transitions from pre-view to post-view with audit side-effect
